const __vite__mapDeps=(i,m=__vite__mapDeps,d=(m.f||(m.f=["assets/ErpWorkspaceRuntime-BNE8Echs.js","assets/documents-Bhnlew-O.js","assets/index-BrdSe0CA.js","assets/charts-7pOQm6Mk.js","assets/index-B9L5ETiY.css","assets/ErpWorkspaceRuntime-CYohkCCU.css"])))=>i.map(i=>d[i]);
import{_ as t}from"./documents-Bhnlew-O.js";import{j as r,E as o}from"./index-BrdSe0CA.js";import{f as s,b as a}from"./charts-7pOQm6Mk.js";const n=a.lazy(()=>t(()=>import("./ErpWorkspaceRuntime-BNE8Echs.js").then(e=>e.E),__vite__mapDeps([0,1,2,3,4,5])));function p(e){return r.jsx(a.Suspense,{fallback:r.jsx(o,{language:e.language}),children:r.jsx(n,{...e})})}const m=s.memo(p);export{m as default};
